_metadata.description: Template secrets for Vault KV v2 engine seeding. All CHANGE_ME values must be replaced with actual credentials before production deployment.
_metadata.warning: DO NOT commit real credentials to version control. This file contains PLACEHOLDER values only.

robot-db.description: PostgreSQL — robot registry, joint states, trajectories, maintenance logs

patient-db.description: PostgreSQL — patient demographics (PHI), vital signs, clinical alerts, consent records

telemetry-db.description: PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB — robot telemetry, sensor data, performance metrics

surgical-controller.description: Surgical robot control plane — real-time command authorization

diagnostic-ai.description: Diagnostic AI inference API — intraoperative imaging analysis

github.description: GitHub API — source control, CI triggers, release management

sonarqube.description: SonarQube — static analysis and quality gate enforcement (IEC 62304)

slack-webhook.description: Slack incoming webhook — operational and clinical alert notifications

docker-registry.description: AWS ECR — container image registry for all NeuroSphere services

aws.description: AWS IAM — CI/CD pipeline access for ECR, EKS, S3, CloudWatch

robot-tls.description: mTLS certificates for robot hardware controller communication

hipaa-signing.description: Digital signing certificates for PHI integrity and clinical documents

primary.description: Primary PHI encryption key — patient records at-rest encryption

field-level.description: Field-level encryption key — SSN, MRN, DOB column encryption
